| Verbosity | Use Case |\n49\t|-------|-----------|----------|\n50\t| `error` | Minimal | Only errors and failures |\n51\t| `warn` | Low | Warnings and errors |\n52\t| `info` | Medium | High-level operations (default) |\n53\t| `debug` | High | Detailed operations and decisions |\n54\t| `trace` | Maximum | All details including function entry/exit |\n55\t\n56\t## Module Paths for Pluck Debugging\n57\t\n58\t### Primary Pluck Module\n59\t- `needle::strand::pluck` - **Core Pluck strand operations**\n60\t\n61\t### Supporting Modules\n62\t- `needle::strand` - General strand operations\n63\t- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store queries and operations\n64\t- `needle::worker` - Worker state machine and processing\n65\t- `needle::dispatch` - Agent dispatch and execution\n66\t- `needle::claim` - Bead claiming operations\n67\t\n68\t## Configuration Examples\n69\t\n70\t### Comprehensive Configuration (All Filtering Decisions)\n71\t\n72\t```bash\n73\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\"\n74\t```\n75\t\n76\t**What this captures:**\n77\t- Individual bead filtering decisions with labels\n78\t- Detailed candidate selection process\n79\t- Split trigger evaluation\n80\t- Worker state transitions\n81\t- Bead claiming operations\n82\t\n83\t### Focused Configuration (Filtering Focus Only)\n84\t\n85\t```bash\n86\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug\"\n87\t```\n88\t\n89\t**What this captures:**\n90\t- Filtering statistics and decisions\n91\t- Candidate counts after each filter\n92\t- Bead store query details\n93\t\n94\t### Minimal Configuration (High-Level Only)\n95\t\n96\t```bash\n97\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=info\"\n98\t```\n99\t\n100\t**What this captures:**\n101\t- Strand start/completion\n102\t- Final candidate counts\n103\t- Split instruction triggers\n104\t\n105\t## Filtering Decision Logging\n106\t\n107\tPluck logs the following filtering decisions at debug level:\n108\t\n109\t### 1. Label Filtering\n110\t```\n111\tDEBUG Label filtering excluded 3 beads\n112\tDEBUG excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\n113\tDEBUG bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n114\t```\n115\t\n116\t### 2. Status/Assignee Filtering\n117\t```\n118\tDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed 2 beads\n119\tDEBUG filtered_count=2 remaining=5\n120\tDEBUG No beads excluded by status/assignee filter\n121\t```\n122\t\n123\t### 3. Candidate Sorting\n124\t```\n125\tDEBUG Sorting 5 candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\n126\tDEBUG total=5 first_bead_id=bf-456 first_priority=1 first_created_at=2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\n127\t```\n128\t\n129\t### 4. Split Trigger Evaluation\n130\t```\n131\tDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\n132\tDEBUG bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\n133\tINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n134\t```\n135\t\n136\t### 5. Final Results\n137\t```\n138\tDEBUG Returning 5 candidates for processing\n139\tINFO candidates=[\"bf-456\", \"bf-789\", \"bf-123\"] count=3\n140\t```\n141\t\n142\t## Using the Capture Script\n143\t\n144\tA helper script is available for automated debug capture:\n145\t\n146\t```bash\n147\t./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n148\t```\n149\t\n150\t**Script features:**\n151\t- Automatically sets comprehensive RUST_LOG configuration\n152\t- Captures all output to timestamped log file\n153\t- Provides grep commands for analysis\n154\t- Supports workspace targeting and count specification\n155\t\n156\t## Analyzing Debug Output\n157\t\n158\t### Find Filtering Decisions\n159\t```bash\n160\tgrep -i \"filter\" pluck-debug-output.log\n161\tgrep -i \"exclude\" pluck-debug-output.log\n162\t```\n163\t\n164\t### Find Specific Beads\n165\t```bash\n166\tgrep \"bf-123\" pluck-debug-output.log\n167\t```\n168\t\n169\t### Find Split Operations\n170\t```bash\n171\tgrep -i \"split\" pluck-debug-output.log\n172\t```\n173\t\n174\t### Find Candidate Selection\n175\t```bash\n176\tgrep -i \"candidate\" pluck-debug-output.log\n177\t```\n178\t\n179\t### Find Label Exclusions\n180\t```bash\n181\tgrep \"Excluded bead due to labels\" pluck-debug-output.log\n182\t```\n183\t\n184\t## Pluck Filtering Process\n185\t\n186\tBased on source code analysis, Pluck applies these filters in order:\n187\t\n188\t1. **Bead Store Query** - Queries ready, unassigned beads with exclude_labels filter\n189\t2. **Label Filtering** - Defensive second pass to remove excluded-label beads\n190\t3. **Status/Assignee Filtering** - Removes in-progress and stale-assignee beads\n191\t4. **Sorting** - Orders by `(priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)`\n192\t5. **Split Trigger Check** - Returns Split instruction if failure count >= threshold\n193\t\n194\t## Default Configuration\n195\t\n196\t### Default Exclude Labels\n197\tWhen not configured, Pluck excludes these labels:\n198\t- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n199\t- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention\n200\t- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n201\t\n202\t### Default Split Threshold\n203\t- **Default:** 3 failures\n204\t- **Disabled:** Set to 0\n205\t\n206\t## Configuration Files\n207\t\n208\t### Global Configuration\n209\t`~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n210\t\n211\t### Workspace Configuration\n212\t`.needle.yaml` in workspace root\n213\t\n214\t```yaml\n215\tstrands:\n216\t  pluck:\n217\t    exclude_labels:\n218\t      - deferred\n219\t      - human\n220\t      - blocked\n221\t    split_threshold: 3\n222\t```\n223\t\n224\t## Tracing Architecture\n225\t\n226\tNEEDLE uses the `tracing` crate for structured logging:\n227\t- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed operations\n228\t- `tracing::info!()` - High-level events\n229\t- `tracing::error!()` - Error conditions\n230\t- `tracing::instrument` macro - Span-based tracing\n231\t\n232\t## Debug Output Format\n233\t\n234\tDebug output uses structured logging format:\n235\t\n236\t```\n237\t2026-07-09T00:32:15.123Z DEBUG needle::strand::pluck:pluck_strand: Pluck strand evaluation starting\n238\t  exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\n239\t```\n240\t\n241\t## Troubleshooting\n242\t\n243\t### No debug output appearing\n244\t\n245\t1. Verify RUST_LOG is set: `echo $RUST_LOG`\n246\t2. Check stderr is being captured: `needle run ... 2>&1 | tee output.log`\n247\t3. Ensure tracing subscriber is initialized (automatic in needle CLI)\n248\t\n249\t### Too much output\n250\t\n251\tNarrow the scope to just the Pluck strand:\n252\t```bash\n253\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n254\t```\n255\t\n256\t### Missing filtering decisions\n257\t\n258\tEnsure trace level is enabled for detailed filtering logic:\n259\t```bash\n260\texport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace\"\n261\t```\n262\t\n263\t## Available Debug Modules\n264\t\n265\tBeyond Pluck, these modules can be debugged:\n266\t\n267\t```\n268\tneedle::strand::pluck      # Pluck strand (primary selection)\n269\tneedle::strand::mend       # Mend strand (recovery)\n270\tneedle::strand::weave      # Weave strand (gap analysis)\n271\tneedle::strand::explore    # Explore strand (investigation)\n272\tneedle::strand::unravel    # Unravel strand (debugging)\n273\tneedle::bead_store         # Bead store operations\n274\tneedle::worker             # Worker lifecycle\n275\tneedle::dispatch           # Agent dispatch\n276\tneedle::claim              # Bead claiming\n277\t```\n278\t\n279\t## Key Debug Events\n280\t\n281\t### At TRACE level:\n282\t- Initial strand evaluation parameters\n283\t- Exact bead store filters being applied\n284\t- Per-bead filtering decisions with labels\n285\t- Individual excluded bead IDs and reasons\n286\t- Detailed split trigger checking\n287\t- Candidate sorting operations\n288\t\n289\t### At DEBUG level:\n290\t- Aggregate filtering statistics\n291\t- Remaining candidate counts after each filter\n292\t- Split threshold checks and triggers\n293\t- Final candidate list returned\n294\t\n295\t### At INFO level:\n296\t- High-level strand start/completion\n297\t- Final candidate counts\n298\t- Split instruction triggers\n299\t\n300\t## Code Reference\n301\t\n302\t- **Pluck implementation:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`\n303\t- **Tracing initialization:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/cli/mod.rs`\n304\t- **Capture script:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n305\t\n306\t## Summary\n307\t\n308\t- **Primary control:** `RUST_LOG` environment variable\n309\t- **Pluck target:** `needle::strand::pluck`\n310\t- **Levels:** `trace` (detailed), `debug` (standard), `info` (minimal)\n311\t- **Helper script:** `capture-pluck-debug.sh` for variable controls logging verbosity using standard Rust tracing levels:\n\n| Level | Verbosity | Use Case |\n|-------|-----------|----------|\n| `error` | Minimal | Only errors and failures |\n| function entry/exit |\n\n## Module Paths for Pluck Debugging\n\n### Primary Pluck Module\n- `needle::strand::pluck` - **Core Pluck strand operations**\n\n### Supporting Modules\n- `needle::strand` - General strand operations\n- `needle::bead_store` - Bead store queries and operations\n- `needle::worker` - Worker state machine and processing\n- `needle::dispatch` - Agent dispatch and execution\n- `needle::claim` - Bead claiming operations\n\n## Configuration Examples\n\n### Comprehensive Configuration (All Filtering Decisions)\n\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::strand=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::worker=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\"\n```\n\n**What this captures:**\n- Individual bead filtering decisions with labels\n- Detailed candidate selection process\n- Split trigger evaluation\n- Worker state transitions\n- Bead claiming operations\n\n### Focused Configuration (Filtering Focus Only)\n\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug,needle::bead_store=debug\"\n```\n\n**What this captures:**\n- Filtering statistics and decisions\n- Candidate counts after each filter\n- Bead store query details\n\n### Minimal Configuration (High-Level Only)\n\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=info\"\n```\n\n**What this captures:**\n- Strand start/completion\n- Final candidate counts\n- Split instruction triggers\n\n## Filtering Decision Logging\n\nPluck logs the following filtering decisions at debug level:\n\n### 1. Label Filtering\n```\nDEBUG Label filtering excluded 3 beads\nDEBUG excluded_count=3 remaining=7 excluded_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]\nDEBUG bead_id=bf-123 labels=[\"deferred\"] excluded_reasons=[\"deferred\"] Excluded bead due to labels\n```\n\n### 2. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\nDEBUG Status/assignee filtering removed 2 beads\nDEBUG filtered_count=2 remaining=5\nDEBUG No beads excluded by status/assignee filter\n```\n\n### 3. Candidate Sorting\n```\nDEBUG Sorting 5 candidates by (priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)\nDEBUG total=5 first_bead_id=bf-456 first_priority=1 first_created_at=2026-07-09T00:00:00Z\n```\n\n### 4. Split Trigger Evaluation\n```\nDEBUG Checking split trigger for first candidate\nDEBUG bead_id=bf-456 failure_count=3 threshold=3 split_triggered=true\nINFO Split threshold reached, returning Split instruction\n```\n\n### 5. Final Results\n```\nDEBUG Returning 5 candidates for processing\nINFO candidates=[\"bf-456\", \"bf-789\", \"bf-123\"] count=3\n```\n\n## Using the Capture Script\n\nA helper script is available for automated debug capture:\n\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR output.log 1\n```\n\n**Script features:**\n- Automatically sets comprehensive RUST_LOG configuration\n- Captures all output to timestamped log file\n- Provides grep commands for analysis\n- Supports workspace targeting and count specification\n\n## Analyzing Debug Output\n\n### Find Filtering Decisions\n```bash\ngrep -i \"filter\" pluck-debug-output.log\ngrep -i \"exclude\" pluck-debug-output.log\n```\n\n### Find Specific Beads\n```bash\ngrep \"bf-123\" pluck-debug-output.log\n```\n\n### Find Split Operations\n```bash\ngrep -i \"split\" pluck-debug-output.log\n```\n\n### Find Candidate Selection\n```bash\ngrep -i \"candidate\" pluck-debug-output.log\n```\n\n### Find Label Exclusions\n```bash\ngrep \"Excluded bead due to labels\" pluck-debug-output.log\n```\n\n## Pluck Filtering Process\n\nBased on source code analysis, Pluck applies these filters in order:\n\n1. **Bead Store Query** - Queries ready, unassigned beads with exclude_labels filter\n2. **Label Filtering** - Defensive second pass to remove excluded-label beads\n3. **Status/Assignee Filtering** - Removes in-progress and stale-assignee beads\n4. **Sorting** - Orders by `(priority ASC, created_at ASC, id ASC)`\n5. **Split Trigger Check** - Returns Split instruction if failure count >= threshold\n\n## Default Configuration\n\n### Default Exclude Labels\nWhen not configured, Pluck excludes these labels:\n- `deferred` - Beads deferred for later processing\n- `human` - Beads requiring human intervention\n- `blocked` - Beads blocked by dependencies\n\n### Default Split Threshold\n- **Default:** 3 failures\n- **Disabled:** Set to 0\n\n## Configuration Files\n\n### Global Configuration\n`~/.config/needle/config.yaml`\n\n### Workspace Configuration\n`.needle.yaml` in workspace root\n\n```yaml\nstrands:\n  pluck:\n    exclude_labels:\n      - deferred\n      - human\n      - blocked\n    split_threshold: 3\n```\n\n## Tracing Architecture\n\nNEEDLE uses the `tracing` crate for structured logging:\n- `tracing::debug!()` - Detailed operations\n- `tracing::info!()` - High-level events\n- `tracing::error!()` - Error conditions\n- `tracing::instrument` macro - Span-based tracing\n\n## Debug Output Format\n\nDebug output uses structured logging format:\n\n```\n2026-07-09T00:32:15.123Z DEBUG needle::strand::pluck:pluck_strand: Pluck strand evaluation starting\n  exclude_labels=[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"] split_threshold=3\n```\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### No debug output appearing\n\n1. Verify RUST_LOG is set: `echo $RUST_LOG`\n2. Check stderr is being captured: `needle run ... 2>&1 | tee output.log`\n3. Ensure tracing subscriber is initialized (automatic in needle CLI)\n\n### Too much output\n\nNarrow the scope to just the Pluck strand:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=debug\"\n```\n\n### Missing filtering decisions\n\nEnsure trace level is enabled for detailed filtering logic:\n```bash\nexport RUST_LOG=\"needle::strand::pluck=trace\"\n```\n\n## Available Debug Modules\n\nBeyond Pluck, these modules can be debugged:\n\n```\nneedle::strand::pluck      # Pluck strand (primary selection)\nneedle::strand::mend       # Mend strand (recovery)\nneedle::strand::weave      # Weave strand (gap analysis)\nneedle::strand::explore    # Explore strand (investigation)\nneedle::strand::unravel    # Unravel strand (debugging)\nneedle::bead_store         # Bead store operations\nneedle::worker             # Worker lifecycle\nneedle::dispatch           # Agent dispatch\nneedle::claim              # Bead claiming\n```\n\n## Key Debug Events\n\n### At TRACE level:\n- Initial strand evaluation parameters\n- Exact bead store filters being applied\n- Per-bead filtering decisions with labels\n- Individual excluded bead IDs and reasons\n- Detailed split trigger checking\n- Candidate sorting operations\n\n### At DEBUG level:\n- Aggregate filtering statistics\n- Remaining candidate counts after each filter\n- Split threshold checks and triggers\n- Final candidate list returned\n\n### At INFO level:\n- High-level strand start/completion\n- Final candidate counts\n- Split instruction triggers\n\n## Code Reference\n\n- **Pluck implementation:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`\n- **Tracing initialization:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/cli/mod.rs`\n- **Capture script:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n\n## Summary\n\n- **Primary control:** `RUST_LOG` environment variable\n- **Pluck target:** `needle::strand::pluck`\n- **Levels:** `trace` (detailed), `debug` (standard), `info` (minimal)\n- **Helper script:** `capture-pluck-debug.sh` for comprehensive capture\n- **Configuration:** Cannot be set in config files - runtime only via `RUST_LOG`\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n- **Pluck Debug Flags:** `notes/bf-5p3g-pluck-debug-flags.md`\n- **Pluck Analysis:** `notes/pluck-debug-configuration.md`\n- **Source Code:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`\n\n---\n\n**Status:** ✅ Complete - Configuration ready for execution","numLines":322,"startLine":1,"totalLines":322}}}
